title: EnderCraft's Infinity Items DataPack
description: This Data Pack Combines Three Data Packs Of Mine Together.
body:
- **This Data Pack Combines Three Data Packs Of Mine Together.**

To Put infinity On These Items Just Put A Infinity Book In Your Offhand And One Of These Three Item In Your Mainhand, Have Fun Now :)

[Infinite Totem Of Undying](https://modrinth.com/datapack/totems-with-infinity)

[Infinite Wind Charge](https://modrinth.com/datapack/infinite-wind-charge)

[Infinite Ender Pearl](https://modrinth.com/datapack/infinite-enderpearl)

- Functions:
- endercrafts_infinite_items:give/totem_of_undying
- endercrafts_infinite_items:give/wind_charge
- endercrafts_infinite_items:give/ender_pearl
